turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?
turns.replyTail:
Dermalogica's Virtual Assistant · AI says:
Tracking information is sent to you via email once your order ships. If you haven’t received it yet, please check your email (including spam/junk folders). You can also log in to your account to check your order status. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience as your order is processed.

turns.q: How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?
turns.replyTail:
ermalogica's Virtual Assistant · AI says:
Most orders are processed and shipped within 24 hours of purchase, depending on product availability. Tracking information is sent via email once your order ships. Orders placed on weekends or holidays are processed and shipped the next business day, so tracking may be sent then.

ry?

Once your order ships, delivery typically takes between 1 and 4 business days, depending on your shipping address. Please note that these times are not guaranteed and may be delayed by weather or other unexpected conditions. Orders are shipped and delivered on business days only.
